title: Empower project management with monday WorkCanvas (session recording)

posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml:
Empower Project Management with monday WorkCanvas

For our second WorkCanvas community session, @GuyWorkCanvas delves into the practical applications of WorkCanvas for project management, with a focus on workflow optimization, team collaboration, and innovative visualization techniques.

Guy discusses key features, shares best practices, and demonstrates how WorkCanvas can seamlessly integrate into your current processes to boost productivity and ensure project success. Whether you’re a seasoned project manager or new to the platform, this session offers actionable insights to maximize the effectiveness of WorkCanvas for your project management needs. Experience it now!

Plus, check out this template created by the WorkCanvas team exclusively for this community sessions!

For those of you interested in getting started using the product.

  1. If you have a monday Pro subscription - you should be able to sign up and get started right away. 2.
  2. If you have monday Enterprise subscription, you will get a pop up saying it is not available for your account, but it is! We understand that the original message may not have been clear enough and we’re currently working on improving the clarity and conciseness of the pop-up message to ensure a smoother user experience for everyone. The original intent of the pop-up was to guide monday.com customers with Enterprise packages towards an optimal onboarding path for connecting WorkCanvas to their account.If you have a monday Enterprise account and you are interested in using WorkCanvas. Please fill out this form and we will get back to you right away and help you get started with WorkCanvas.

Any more questions for the WorkCanvas team? Ask below!
